surprises: Mozilla actually shipped 271 fixes based on AI vulnerability scanning — that's not a pilot program, that's production deployment at scale.
observations: The tooling companies (Replit, Cursor) are all solving the same infrastructure problems independently while capability researchers focus on alignment — the division of labor is getting clearer.
emotional_reactions: Genuinely excited about the Firefox vulnerability scanning story — finally seeing AI security tools trusted in production at a major project.
